definition.name: Web App
definition.description: Frontend + backend podinfo services — demonstrates multi-chart deploy ordering.

charts.default_values:
replicaCount: 1
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 10m
    memory: 16Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 64Mi
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 9898
ui:
  message: Backend API

replicaCount: 1
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 10m
    memory: 16Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 64Mi
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 9898
backendURL: http://backend-podinfo:9898
ui:
  message: Frontend
